meta.title: Did a YOUTUBER just uncover America's most secret stealth jet?!
meta.description:
Did an adventurous YouTuber manage to capture images and video of a new American stealth aircraft that’s so classified that we don’t even know what it is? That is the distinct possibility we’re facing as these images captured by the YouTube channel Uncanny Expeditions hit the internet last week. 

Check out Uncanny Expeditions on YouTube here: https://www.youtube.com/@UncannyExpeditions/featured

Check out the interview here: https://www.youtube.com/live/j3Jl_DN7VEw?si=H-cpTSWjV3T0-IX7

Check out Dreamland Resort on YouTube here: https://www.youtube.com/@Dreamland-Resort

Check out the first outlet we saw covering this story here: https://theaviationist.com/2026/01/18/dorito-shaped-aircraft-spotted-near-area-51/
